title: Started Programming & Hardware
description: Began with Visual Basic, C# and C/C++ — learning fundamentals of programming, memory management, and how software interacts with hardware. Simultaneously started working with PC hardware: building, diagnosing, and repairing computers.

title: Chip-Level Laptop Repair
description: Developed expertise in chip-level laptop motherboard repair — BGA reballing, soldering, schematic reading, and power rail diagnostics. Serviced laptops at component level beyond standard board replacements.

title: First Web Projects
description: Expanded into web development — HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Built first personal projects and started understanding client-server architecture and networking fundamentals.

title: Systems & Low-Level Programming
description: Deep dive into Windows internals, reverse engineering, and low-level systems programming. Started experimenting with kernel-mode code and driver development.

title: Joined Acom Information Technology
description: Joined Acom Information Technology as Full-Stack Developer & System Administrator. Responsible for web application development, server management, network infrastructure, and IT systems administration.

title: Full-Stack Developer & SysAdmin @ Acom IT
description: 3 years at Acom Information Technology — built and maintained web platforms, managed servers and network infrastructure, administered IT systems, and provided technical support. Gained deep real-world experience across the full stack and systems administration.

title: Left Acom IT — Joined Cyber Yakku
description: Left Acom Information Technology after 3 years to take on a senior role at Cyber Yakku PVT LTD. Continued expanding into HWID authentication systems, kernel development, and mobile apps alongside professional responsibilities.

title: Senior Software Developer & Project Manager @ Cyber Yakku PVT LTD
description: Leading software development and project delivery at Cyber Yakku PVT LTD. Responsibilities span full-stack web and mobile development, systems engineering, technical architecture, and managing project timelines and cross-functional teams. Driving product strategy and overseeing delivery of production-grade software across multiple domains.

title: Mobile & Cross-Platform Development
description: Started Flutter development for iOS and Android. Built cross-platform apps with Firebase backends and real-time geolocation features.

title: Dansal App — 800K+ Downloads
description: Launched the Dansal App for Sri Lanka's Vesak festival season. Reached 800,000+ downloads and was featured on Sha FM national radio.

title: ExcellentComputers.lk
description: Delivered a full production e-commerce platform for a computer hardware retailer in Sri Lanka, live at excellentcomputers.lk.

title: The Alpha Platform — Launched
description: Built and deployed a full SaaS platform with hardware-ID licensing at thealpha.vip. Serving real users with cryptographic license protection.

title: Open Source: Weedr & APK-Wooper
description: Released two open-source tools — Weedr (secure qBittorrent dashboard) and APK-Wooper (self-hosted APK analysis workspace) — on GitHub.

title: Security Research & AI/ML
description: Expanding into hypervisor research, detection/anti-detection systems, driver communication architectures, and AI-assisted automation.
